data.title: 国际服炸服7
data.summary: [10/5(Wed) Temporary Maintenance Notice 2] We'll be undergoing temporary maintenance on 10/5 (Wed).
data.body:
[10/5(Wed) Temporary Maintenance Notice 2]
We'll be undergoing temporary maintenance on 10/5 (Wed).

Maintenance Period: 10/5 (Wed) 21:00 (UTC) – TBD
Details: https://m.nexon.com/forum/thread/101374

※Please stay tuned for further updates on this temporary maintenance.

We are sorry to announce that the scheduled maintenance has been postponed until further notice due to the delay in the Market's price change.

[10/6(Thu) Temporary Maintenance Notice]
The temporary maintenance will resume on 10/6 (Thu) at 3:00 until further notice (UTC).

Maintenance Period: 10/6(Thu) 3:00 (UTC) – TBD
Details: https://m.nexon.com/forum/thread/101374

※Please check back for more updates on the progress in the notice.

[Maintenance Notice]

We're currently under our 10/6 (Thu) temporary maintenance.
The game is unavailable while under maintenance.

Maintenance Period: 10/6 (Thu) 3:00 (UTC) – TBD
Details: https://m.nexon.com/forum/thread/101374

※Please stay tuned for further updates on this  maintenance.

10/6 (Thu) temporary maintenance will be finished on 8:00 AM (UTC).

Maintenance Reward: Pyroxene x600
Details: https://m.nexon.com/forum/thread/101374

10/6 (Thu) temporary maintenance has ended.

Please also note that the in-app purchase will remain unavailable for iOS devices until the price changes are fully applied.
There may be another round of temporary maintenance for the task.
We apologize again for the constant delay.

We will be making a separate announcement regarding this maintenance at least 20 minutes before it begins
so please stay tuned - Thank you for your patience.

Details: https://m.nexon.com/forum/thread/101374
